# Rejish Khanal - Technical SEO Specialist & Full Stack Developer

## About Rejish Khanal

Rejish Khanal is a Technical SEO Specialist and Full Stack Developer based in Kathmandu, Nepal. He works at Gripas Marketing and helps businesses improve organic traffic by 40-60% through technical SEO, schema markup, Core Web Vitals optimization, and full-stack web development using Django, Laravel, and Next.js.

## Services

### SEO Services
- Technical SEO optimization and audits
- Core Web Vitals optimization (LCP, INP, CLS)
- Local SEO for Kathmandu and Nepal businesses
- Schema markup implementation
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- JavaScript SEO for rendering issues
- Google Search Console monitoring

### Web Development Services
- Next.js development with SEO optimization
- Django backend development
- Laravel and PHP development
- Vue.js frontend development
- PostgreSQL and MySQL databases
- SEO-friendly website architecture

## Industries Served

- SaaS and Technology
- Ecommerce
- Restaurants and Hospitality
- Local Businesses
- Marketing Agencies
- Startups
- Digital Products
- Professional Services
- Education Consultancies
- Finance and Loan Websites
- Real Estate Businesses
- Personal Brands

## Work Process

1. SEO and Business Discovery - Understanding business goals, target audience, and search objectives
2. Website Audit and Strategy - Reviewing technical SEO, content, page structure, and Core Web Vitals
3. SEO and Development Implementation - Implementing technical fixes, schema markup, and SEO features
4. Tracking and Ongoing Optimization - Monitoring rankings, traffic, conversions, and technical health

## Key Differentiators

- Combines SEO strategy with developer-level technical implementation
- Understands technical SEO, full stack development, Core Web Vitals, JavaScript SEO, and structured data
- Builds websites with SEO-ready architecture from the start
- Supports traditional SEO, AEO, GEO, and AI search readiness
- Focuses on search intent, technical clarity, content structure, and conversion-focused pages
- Helps Nepal-based and international businesses improve organic visibility
